videoSnippet.title: Can You Find the Crazy Checkmate? || Andreikin vs Abdusattorov || Chennai Grand Masters 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Andreikin, Dmitry (2710) - Abdusattorov, Nodirbek (2766)
Quantbox Chennai Grand Masters 2026 (Chess.com) [07] 2026.07.21
D44 Queen's Gambit Declined semi-Slav, 5.Bg5 dc

1.d4 d5 2.Nf3 Nf6 3.c4 e6 4.Nc3 c6 5.Bg5 dxc4 6.a4 Bb4 7.e4 Bxc3+ 8.bxc3 Qa5 9.e5 Ne4 10.Rc1 b5 11.Qc2 Nxg5 12.Nxg5 Qxa4 13.Qxa4 bxa4 14.Ne4 Nd7 15.Bxc4 Ke7 16.f4 a5 17.Rb1 Ba6 18.Bxa6 Rxa6 19.Kd2 Rha8 20.c4 c5 21.d5 f6 22.Rb7 R6a7 23.d6+ Kd8 24.Rb5 fxe5 25.fxe5 Nxe5 26.Rxc5 Nd7 27.Rb5 Nf6 28.Nc5 Rc8 29.Re1 Ke8 30.Kc3 a3 31.Nxe6 a2 32.c5 Kd7 33.Nxg7 Nd5+ 34.Kc4 Kc6 35.Nf5 Re8 36.Nd4+ Kd7 37.c6+
